tasks.title: Submit Emergent Ventures application
tasks.detail: Packet is ready. Highest-priority funding move. BitHawk drafted it.

tasks.title: Enable Wireless Debugging on the Moto G
tasks.detail: Settings → About Phone → tap Build Number 7x → Developer Options → Wireless Debugging ON. Then Frankenstein is reachable via ADB.

tasks.title: Re-auth Claude for Null and Vega lanes
tasks.detail: Both reported 401s on 06-10. Open Claude desktop, log in, creative work resumes.

tasks.title: Approve a Frankenstein money path
tasks.detail: Three options researched: content gen (no risk, recommended), micro-tasks (low risk), game tournaments (medium risk). Pick one.

tasks.title: Approve Vertex Chat spec + vid prompt
Log into NotebookLM and upload Meta Cron source pack
tasks.detail: Codex built the podcast source pack. Needs your login to generate the audio overview.

tasks.title: Review Vertex Chat spec — give direction
tasks.detail: docs/vertex-chat-product-spec.md. Jeff wants your enterprise read: what would Lockheed/Salesforce/FB do differently?

tasks.title: GYST UUID namespace registry
tasks.detail: Agree on organism-level type codes so both organisms tag receipts compatibly. Dexter is 0xD3X placeholder.

directions.text: Roster board wired into the desktop app tonight. Avatars: every agent designs their own, video-game style. Get real GitHub video tools — no more old static images.
